message:
Add backend demo mode for instant demo data (#426)

When demo mode is enabled (via X-Demo-Mode header), the backend
now returns demo data immediately without trying to connect to
real Kubernetes clusters. This eliminates 5-30 second timeout
delays that occurred when real cluster connections failed.

Changes:
- Add isDemoMode() helper to check X-Demo-Mode header
- Create demo_data.go with demo data for all endpoints
- Add demo mode checks to all MCP handlers
- Frontend sends X-Demo-Mode header when demo mode is enabled

This dramatically improves the demo experience by providing
instant responses instead of waiting for cluster timeouts.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
